definition: An OpenType/sfnt font blob must carry an exact 4-byte table FOURCC tag (cmap, GSUB, CPAL, CFF2, CFF, post, OS/2, loca, typ1, _COLR, or name) in the table directory so the relevant table is located, AND the surrounding header/sanitizer integer fields (offsets, lengths, counts, palette indices) must reach jointly-consistent values; I2S plants the exact FOURCC from the CmpLogObserver into the directory slot while VP's CMP_MAP gradient climbs the multi-field integer comparisons in the sanitizer/loader, both being jointly necessary because the exact tag cannot be guessed by gradient and the integer structure cannot be assembled by single-shot substitution alone.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.
